Off Calendar Apr-12-2021 Continued To May-24-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Aug-05-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Janet Boessenecker appeared by zoom for Public Administrator.

Ms. Boessenecker stated that she reached out to the New York firm last week regarding the unclaimed New York property, that she was informed by the Attorney that they contacted the Court to request amended letters and were told by the Court that they are only doing essential cases, and that she has not received any further status. Ms. Boessenecker also stated that the omnibus clause is for after discovered assets, that they have already discovered these assets and that they can do final distribution with instructions that the Administrator has the authority to collect what ends up being the net amount and then distribute it. In addition, Ms. Boessenecker stated that she thinks the unclaimed property is about $13,500.00, that they have about $1,500,000.00 on hand as of the last accounting, that they are only asking for a preliminary distribution of $980,000.00, that there will still be a significant amount left and that she has requested an additional eight months to administer the estate. Furthermore, Ms. Boessenecker stated that dual language assignments have been filed in this Court and is a long-standing practice. The Tenth Account and Report of Conservator, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Cabasares. Not reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1208 Powhattan Ave., San Francisco, Ca 94110)
Off Calendar Jan-30-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Janet Boessenecker for San Francisco Public Administrator.

The sale was confirmed at $823,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed December 19, 2018. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to receipt and review of the order). Bond is not required. Ms. Boessenecker is to submit a proposed order.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Loo. Not reported.
